observabilityTab.noSpansYet: No spans yet — make a request to see traces.
observabilityTab.endpointHelp: Leave empty to generate traces without exporting. Override with OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT env var.
observabilityTab.logLevelHelp: Python log level forwarded to the OTLP log exporter. Override with OTEL_LOG_LEVEL.
observabilityTab.pipelineIntro: Compaction, batching, and S3 settings for the Parquet→Iceberg trace pipeline. All apply on restart.
observabilityTab.s3EndpointHelp: S3 endpoint for Parquet→Iceberg compaction. Override with PROVISA_OTEL_S3_ENDPOINT.
observabilityTab.compactCronHelp: Cron expression for the Parquet→Iceberg compaction job.
observabilityTab.compactBatchSizeHelp: Rows per INSERT batch during compaction. Lower for low-memory engines.
observabilityTab.compactFileChunkHelp: Parquet files processed per compaction chunk.
observabilityTab.opsSnapshotRetentionHelp: Expire Iceberg snapshots + orphan files older than this on startup. Empty = never expire.
observabilityTab.spanExportDelayHelp: BatchSpanProcessor flush interval. Lower reduces trace latency.
observabilityTab.otlp2parquetMaxAgeHelp: Max age before a Parquet batch flushes to S3.
observabilityTab.restartNote: Note: endpoint and service_name changes take effect on next restart. Sample rate is applied immediately.
observabilityTab.supportIntro: Optionally forward telemetry to Provisa support. SQL literals are stripped by default.
observabilityTab.supportEndpointHelp: Leave empty to disable support telemetry. Override with PROVISA_SUPPORT_OTLP_ENDPOINT env var.
observabilityTab.redactSqlLabel: Redact SQL literals before forwarding to support
observabilityTab.redactAttrsHelp: Attribute keys to drop entirely before sending to support.
